\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Minimal command-\/line argument parsing utilities. 

This header defines a small hierarchy of parser classes to simplify reading options from {\ttfamily main} (int argc, char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} argv\mbox{[}\mbox{]}). It supports\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Templated options bound to user variables (\doxylink{classCLOption}{CLOption$<$\+T$>$})
\item String options (\doxylink{classCLStringOption}{CLString\+Option}) that may include spaces
\item Flags (\doxylink{classCLFlag}{CLFlag}) that simply toggle a boolean when present 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{CLParser_8h_source}{CLParser.\+h}}.
